name: brain0
desc: The black box for AI-written code. Passive decision graph linking every commit to the agent prompts behind it: drift detection, DLP audit of what agents read, …
descFull: The black box for AI-written code. Passive decision graph linking every commit to the agent prompts behind it: drift detection, DLP audit of what agents read, evidence-driven risk, MCP memory for coding agents, signed provenance attestations. One command, offline by default.
